classification_rationale: This is a thin meta-repo containing ONLY documentation, governance, and agent-orchestration manifests — zero code, schemas, contracts, or canonical type definitions. package.json self-describes it: "description": "AFI Protocol documentation and specifications" with stub scripts ("build": "echo 'Build script TBD'", "test": "echo 'Test script TBD'"). README.md:1 calls it "AFI Protocol (Meta-Repo)". File inventory is exhaustively: README.md, architecture_overview.md, droid_registry.md, package.json, .aider.conf.json, LICENSE.md (0 bytes), factory/agent_manifest.json, contributor-manifest/*.md, .github/workflows/lint.yml. find for *.ts/*.sol/*.schema.json returned nothing. It documents/points at other repos but defines no protocol surface itself, so DOCS (not NORMATIVE/REFERENCE_IMPL).
primary_purpose: A governance/onboarding meta-repo that orchestrates the AFI ("Agentic Financial Intelligence") ecosystem by pointing human contributors and Factory.ai/augmentcode droids at the other AFI repos (afi-core, afi-reactor, afi-config, afi-infra, afi-docs, afi-gateway, afi-ops) via README, an architecture overview, a droid registry, and a contributor manifest.
protocol_touchpoints: DAG/pipeline (described only, in architecture_overview.md — reactor as 'source of truth')
registries/reputation (mentioned in faq/announcement: reputation, DAO votes, mentor registry)
schemas (referenced only as 'persona schemas'/'Codex definitions' pointing at afi-config; none present)

reference_only_assumptions.quote: **Canonical orchestration status:** AFI Reactor uses a **custom deterministic TypeScript DAG** (`afi-reactor/src/dag/`), not LangChain/LangGraph.

contradictions.title: Reactor framed as the single 'source of truth' orchestrator, not a reference implementation
contradictions.detail: The architecture table elevates afi-reactor's DAG to 'source of truth' / 'Canonical orchestration status' for the whole ecosystem. Under the portable-protocol north star, the reactor is ONE reference spine; the canonical surface is the schemas/lifecycle/determinism rules. Calling reactor 'source of truth' / 'canonical' in the org's top-level meta-repo entrenches a specific stack as protocol law. Note: line 6 does scope 'Canonical' to orchestration-engine choice (custom DAG vs LangGraph), which softens but does not remove the framing.
contradictions.evidence: architecture_overview.md:23 '| **Reactor** | DAG orchestration (source of truth) | `afi-reactor` |'; architecture_overview.md:6 '**Canonical orchestration status:** AFI Reactor uses a **custom deterministic TypeScript DAG**'

contradictions.title: Stale repo names referenced in onboarding (afi-agents, afi-labs) and droid manifest doc path
contradictions.detail: onboarding.md recommends forking `afi-agents` (a known-stale repo name per audit tensions) and `afi-labs`; the architecture overview's repo set (afi-core/reactor/infra/config/ops/docs/gateway) does not include afi-agents, indicating drift. factory/agent_manifest.json also points documentation at ../afi-docs/droid_contributor_guide.md (cross-repo relative path that only resolves in a mono-checkout).
contradictions.evidence: contributor-manifest/onboarding.md:9 '[`afi-agents`](https://github.com/AFI-Protocol/afi-agents) – agent configs & runtime'; onboarding.md:11 'The `afi-labs` repo hosts experimental code and is **private**.'

contradictions.title: Architecture overview references a non-existent local diagrams/ directory
contradictions.detail: architecture_overview.md depicts a `diagrams/` folder ('high level PNG/SVG diagrams') in the repo tree, but no such directory exists in the checkout. Minor doc/repo drift.
contradictions.evidence: architecture_overview.md:11 '├─ diagrams/                  ← high level PNG/SVG diagrams (add as you build)'; find shows no diagrams/ dir

downstream: afi-reactor (referenced as DAG source of truth)

notable_findings.title: No normative artifacts present — purely documentation meta-repo
notable_findings.evidence: find for *.ts/*.sol/*.schema.json returned nothing; only files are README.md, architecture_overview.md, droid_registry.md, package.json, .aider.conf.json, LICENSE.md (0B), factory/agent_manifest.json, contributor-manifest/*.md, .github/workflows/lint.yml
notable_findings.recommendation: Treat as DOCS/governance only. The portable-protocol normative surface (USS, CPJ, vault/pipeline/blueprint/plugin schemas, contracts, TSSD types, replay spec) lives in afi-config/afi-docs/afi-token/afi-infra, not here.

notable_findings.title: package.json scripts are stubs (no build/test)
notable_findings.recommendation: None; consistent with a docs meta-repo. Note the ESLint CI (lint.yml:22) is explicitly non-blocking ('|| true # non-blocking for early droid commits') and there are no .ts files for it to lint.

notable_findings.title: Reactor labeled 'source of truth' / 'canonical' in org-level architecture
notable_findings.evidence: architecture_overview.md:23 '| **Reactor** | DAG orchestration (source of truth) | `afi-reactor` |'; architecture_overview.md:6 '**Canonical orchestration status:** AFI Reactor uses a **custom deterministic TypeScript DAG**'
notable_findings.recommendation: Reframe reactor as the reference orchestration spine; make explicit that the protocol's canonical surface is the schemas/lifecycle/determinism rules, and that conformant alternative DAGs (custom / Mage blocks) are permitted per AFI_PORTABLE_PROTOCOL_SURFACE.

notable_findings.title: Stale repo references (afi-agents) and cross-repo relative doc paths
notable_findings.evidence: contributor-manifest/onboarding.md:9 '`afi-agents` – agent configs & runtime'; factory/agent_manifest.json:20 '"documentation": "../afi-docs/droid_contributor_guide.md"'; agent_manifest entries use '@afi-core/...' / '@afi-infra/...' paths
notable_findings.recommendation: Tag stale; reconcile onboarding repo list with the current repo set (afi-core/reactor/infra/config/ops/docs/gateway) and fix/relocate the relative afi-docs link.

notable_findings.title: Registries/reputation mentioned only as governance aspiration
notable_findings.evidence: contributor-manifest/faq.md:9-10 'How are contributions recognized? Via reputation, DAO votes, and protocol mentions.'; announcement_contributor_2025.md:27 'opening up the **mentor registry** for new personas and utility behaviors.'
notable_findings.recommendation: None here; the normative REGISTRIES_AND_REPUTATION spec lives elsewhere. Consistent with the rule that reputation/registries influence selection/allocation, not deterministic scoring (no scoring code present in this repo).

notable_findings.title: Pattern searches found no mongodb/TSSD/vault/USS/CPJ/mint/replay/BigQuery/kafka/postgres references
notable_findings.evidence: grep -rinE across *.md/*.json/*.ts/*.sol/*.yml for the full audit pattern set returned only incidental hits: 'Codex definitions' (architecture_overview.md:26), 'pipelines' (pathways.md:8, working-groups.md:5), 'LangGraph/DAG' (architecture_overview.md:6)
notable_findings.recommendation: Confirms zero replay/determinism/vault/mint surface in this repo. No follow-up needed beyond the reference-vs-normative clarification for reactor.
